name: StickerCard2.0
title: StickerCard 2.0
summary: A browser-based tool that resizes any uploaded image to fit perfectly on a credit card — designed for custom sticker printing. Features a clean UI with live preview.

name: Histree
title: Histree
summary: An interactive web app that lets users explore and learn history through films and TV shows, connecting historical events to pop culture in an engaging visual interface.

name: A24Colour
title: A24-Style Photo Converter
summary: A Python tool that applies A24 film studio colour grading and visual aesthetics to photographs using image processing and machine learning techniques.

name: GameWalking
title: Real-World Step Converter
summary: Bridges the physical and digital: reads step data from a fitness tracker and translates real-world steps into in-game character movement in real time.

name: Movie-Recommendation-System-Mark-1
title: Movie Recommendation System
summary: A system that recommends movies based on user preferences using machine learning algorithms.
